meta.name: Sample COTS FPV Catalog
meta.description: Realistic off-the-shelf FPV / small-UAS hardware catalog: flight controllers, ESCs, motors, batteries, VTXes with switchable power levels, ELRS TX/RX, goggles, and GPS modules. Built for hobbyist and commercial sUAS builders. Demonstrates compatibility validation, link-budget math, density-altitude derating, and endurance estimation.

airframes.name: 5" True-X Freestyle Frame (TBS Source One / Armattan / equivalent)
airframes.notes: Workhorse 5" true-X frame with 4mm carbon arms and 30.5×30.5 FC mount.

airframes.name: 7" Long-Range Frame (iFlight Chimera7 / equivalent)
airframes.notes: Long-range 7" with room for HD VTX, GPS, and higher-capacity packs.

airframes.name: 10" Heavy-Lift / Mapping X-Frame (MultiRotorMania Dragonfly / equivalent)
airframes.notes: 10" X-frame for heavy-lift, mapping, and cinematography builds. Supports long-range link and higher-capacity packs.

airframes.name: Fixed-Wing 660mm Pusher (Volantex Raptor / Sonicmodell / equivalent)
airframes.notes: Compact fixed-wing with pusher config — 60+ min endurance on Li-ion.

airframes.name: 1900mm Flying-Wing (Skywalker X8 / Z84 / equivalent)
airframes.notes: Flying-wing platform for 2+ hour endurance / mapping flights with Li-ion.

airframes.name: BetaFPV Pavo20 Pro Brushless Whoop Frame
airframes.notes: 2" ducted cinewhoop frame for sub-150g HD builds. Compatible with DJI O3 / O4 Air Unit and Walksnail Avatar HD VTX.

airframes.name: GEPRC SMART 35 HD 3.5" Micro Freestyle Frame
airframes.notes: Sub-250g HD micro freestyle. 1404 motors at 3850KV. Compatible with Caddx Vista / Walksnail VTX.

airframes.name: BetaFPV Pavo Pico II 1.6" Cinewhoop Frame
airframes.notes: Sub-100g cinewhoop frame redesigned for DJI O4 system. Lava 1102 motors at 14,000KV, GF 45mm props.

airframes.name: iFlight Nazgul Evoque F5 V3 5" DC/X Switchable Frame
airframes.notes: Switchable DC/X frame geometry. Built for DJI O4 / Walksnail HD. Anti-spark, dual BEC.

airframes.name: Armattan Rooster 5" Freestyle Frame
airframes.notes: Lifetime warranty true-X 5" freestyle frame. Premium build quality. 30.5x30.5 FC mount.

motors.name: EMAX ECO II 2807 1300KV
motors.notes: 1300KV is low for 5" 6S; best matched to 7" cruise or fixed-wing pusher/puller configurations.

motors.name: RCInPower GTS V4 2207 1960KV
motors.notes: Limited stock; substitute Axisflying AF227 (on order) required for full 5" fleet build.

motors.name: Avenger 3110 730KV (generic)
motors.notes: Generic Amazon rebrand, no official datasheet. QC varies unit-to-unit — inspect for smooth rotation and bell balance before install.

motors.name: iFlight XING2 2207 1750KV Unibell
motors.notes: 5" 4S-6S workhorse. Center slotted N52H magnets, 5mm titanium shaft, 16x16 mount.

motors.name: iFlight XING2 2207 2050KV Unibell
motors.notes: 5" freestyle / race. Same 30.5g body; 49A peak draw matches Lumenier 51A ESC.

motors.name: EMAX ECO II 2207 2400KV
motors.notes: Budget 5" race motor. N52SH arc magnets, 16x16 mount, EZO 9mm bearings.

motors.name: T-Motor F40 PRO V 1950KV
motors.notes: 5" 6S race / high-thrust freestyle. EZO bearings, hollow shaft.

motors.name: Happymodel SE0802 19000KV Tinywhoop Motor
motors.notes: 1S tinywhoop motor for Mobula6 / Mobula7 / 65-75mm whoops. 1.0mm shaft, 9N12P, JST1.25mm.

motors.name: T-Motor Velox V2207 V3 1950KV
motors.notes: Velox V3 5" freestyle motor. Hollow shaft, EZO bearings, N52H magnets.

motors.name: iFlight XING 2806.5 1300KV Unibell Cinelifter
motors.notes: 7-8" long-range / cinelifter motor. 4mm titanium shaft, NSK bearings, N52H curved arc magnets.

motors.name: T-Motor F40 PRO V 2150KV
motors.notes: 5" 6S race motor. Higher KV variant for tighter prop pitches.

motors.name: T-Motor F40 PRO II 1750KV
motors.notes: Mature 5" 6S race / freestyle motor. Lighter than V-series.

motors.name: BrotherHobby Avenger V3 2207.5 1750KV
motors.notes: 5" 6S build with 2kg thrust on 5.1" props at 52A peak. N52H magnets, NMB bearings, titanium hollow shaft.

motors.name: BetaFPV 1102 18000KV Tinywhoop Motor
motors.notes: 1S tinywhoop motor for 75mm whoops (Cetus Pro, Meteor75 HD). 1.5mm shaft, ball bearings.

escs.name: Holybro Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A 4-in-1 ESC
escs.notes: 65A continuous, 80A burst 10s. Pairs with Kakute H7 V2 via 8-pin JST-SH factory ribbon.

connectors.label: FC Signal
connectors.notes: Motor signals + telemetry to Kakute H7 BT

escs.name: SpeedyBee 60A BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC (30x30)
escs.notes: BLHeli_S = no bidirectional DShot out-of-box; reflash with BlueJay for RPM filtering.

connectors.label: FC Signal
connectors.notes: Motor signals to SpeedyBee F405 V4

escs.name: Lumenier 51A BLHeli_32 Single ESC (w/ Telemetry)
escs.notes: Single ESC for fixed-wing use with F405-WING V2. BLHeli_32 is locked/unflashable post-EOL — stock settings work for fixed-wing.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba F55 128K 55A 6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.notes: Premium 30.5x30.5mm 4-in-1 for 6S 5" builds. 65A burst, metal EMI firewall, 470uF cap included.

escs.name: HGLRC SPECTER 60A 4-in-1 BLHeli32
escs.notes: 20x20mm 4-in-1 with CNC heat sink. STM32G071 128K MCU. Nano-coated for moisture resistance.

escs.name: T-Motor F55A Pro II 55A 4-in-1 BLHeli32
escs.notes: 30.5x30.5mm 4-in-1 with BEC. 65A burst. AM32 firmware support.

batteries.name: 6S 1300mAh 100C (5" race pack)
batteries.notes: Standard 5" quad race pack. Pairs with SpeedyBee F4 V4 stack (60A ESC) + RCInPower 1960KV motors. Expect ~4-6 min flight.

batteries.name: 6S 1500mAh 100C (5" freestyle pack)
batteries.notes: Good balance of power and endurance for 5" training. ~5-7 min flight.

batteries.name: 6S 3000mAh 35C (10" heavy-lift endurance pack)
batteries.notes: Endurance pack for 10" heavy-lift platforms with Avenger 3110 motors. ~15-20 min cruise.

batteries.name: 4S 5200mAh Li-ion (long-range / fixed-wing)
batteries.notes: Li-ion endurance pack for fixed-wing. Better cold-weather performance than LiPo — matters for ~45-60 min cruise.

batteries.name: GAONENG GNB 6S 1300mAh 120C (5" race / freestyle)
batteries.notes: Green-label race pack. 240C burst. Fits standard 5" freestyle bays.

batteries.name: CNHL Black Series V2 6S 1300mAh 130C
batteries.notes: Black Series — premium race pack with low internal resistance. Common alternative to GNB.

batteries.name: Tattu R-Line V5 4S 1300mAh 150C
batteries.notes: Race-class 4S pack with Al Boehmite tech. 3-5" FPV racing / freestyle.

batteries.name: GAONENG GNB 1S 450mAh 90C HV Tinywhoop
batteries.notes: 1S HV tinywhoop / cinewhoop pack. BT2.0 connector. Industry standard for sub-100g whoops.

batteries.name: Tattu R-Line V5 6S 1300mAh 150C
batteries.notes: Premium 6S race pack with Al Boehmite tech. 5" race / freestyle.

batteries.name: GAONENG GNB 4S 850mAh 90C (Toothpick / 3-3.5")
batteries.notes: 4S 850mAh for 3-3.5" toothpick / micro freestyle builds with XT30.

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F405 V4 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.notes: 8-pin ribbon to paired ESC. App-based BT config.

flight_controllers.name: Matek F405-WING V2 (Fixed Wing FC)
flight_controllers.notes: Fixed-wing only (INAV/ArduPilot, not Betaflight). Pair with Matek M10Q-5883 GPS/compass.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Kakute H7 V2 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.notes: 30.5x30.5 mount. 2S-8S input. ESP32-C3 onboard Bluetooth. 9V VTX pit switch.

flight_controllers.name: Matek H743-SLIM V4 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.notes: H7 powerhouse for ArduPilot / INAV / long-range / fixed-wing. 30.5x30.5 mount. 2-8S input.

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F405 V4 BLS 55A AIO
flight_controllers.notes: All-in-one FC + 55A 4-in-1 ESC. 30.5x30.5 mount. Bluetooth-app configuration. 3-6S input.

flight_controllers.name: Matek F722-SE AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.notes: Workhorse F7 FC. Dual gyros (SPI). 30.5x30.5 mount. 2-6S input. Mature INAV / Betaflight target.

radios.name: HGLRC ELRS Gemini RX Dual Diversity (2.4GHz)
radios.notes: 4G variant). Dual SX1281 + TCXO, refresh 50-1000Hz. Sensitivity -108dBm @ 50Hz, -104dBm @ 500Hz. 3x power-cycle to bind.

radios.name: HGLRC ELRS Gemini RX Dual Diversity (915MHz)
radios.notes: Dual SX1276 + ESP32-PICO-D4, refresh 25-200Hz. Long-range variant.

radios.name: Solkin R24-S ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
radios.notes: Single SX1280 (no diversity). Fixed-wing LOS use with F405-WING V2.

radios.name: HappyModel ES24TX Pro Micro — 1000mW ELRS TX Module
radios.notes: Micro JR bay TX module for TX16S Mk II. 25Hz-500Hz refresh. Active cooling fan + RGB. Antenna gain 4.18dBi.

radios.name: Holybro Atlatl HV V2 — Analog VTX
HDZero Freestyle V2 VTX (digital HD)
radios.notes: Power: 25/200/500/1000mW. 720p60, <13ms latency. Pairs with HDZero Goggle.

radios.name: Rotor Riot Reaper Extreme V2 — Analog VTX 1.6W
radios.notes: Power: 25/200/500/1000/1600mW. Specialty long-range/range-extender use. Not for routine training (exceeds FCC/CE limits in some regions).

radios.name: RadioMaster RP1 V2 ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Nano RX
radios.notes: TCXO-stabilized ELRS nano RX. SX1281 RF chip, ESP8285 MCU. 65mm T-antenna in box.

radios.name: RadioMaster XR1 Nano Dual-Band ExpressLRS RX
radios.notes: Dual-band 2.4GHz + 900MHz ELRS RX. Semtech LR1121 RF, ESP32C3 MCU. 1g (no antenna).

radios.name: RadioMaster ER6 2.4GHz ELRS PWM RX
radios.notes: 6-channel PWM ELRS RX for fixed-wing / non-FC builds. Dual-antenna.

radios.name: RadioMaster Pocket ELRS 16ch Transmitter
radios.notes: 16-channel hall-gimbal ELRS pocket transmitter. EdgeTX, USB-C QC3 charging, dual 18650 (sold separately).

radios.name: TBS Crossfire Nano RX (915/868MHz LoRa)
radios.notes: 12-channel LoRa RX. 40km range. 11x18x11mm. Industry standard for long-range.

radios.name: Happymodel EP1 TCXO ExpressLRS 2.4GHz RX
radios.notes: TCXO-stabilized ELRS nano RX. SX1281 RF, ESP8285 MCU. 10x10x6mm. Cheapest reliable ELRS RX.

radios.name: RadioMaster Boxer ELRS 2.4GHz Transmitter
radios.notes: 16-channel hall-gimbal ELRS handheld. EdgeTX, 128x64 LCD, built-in cooling fan, 2x 18650 (separate).

radios.name: TBS Tango 2 Pro Crossfire Transmitter
radios.notes: Built-in Crossfire Micro TX. Folding HAL gimbals. 5000mAh 1S internal battery. 30km range.

radios.name: BetaFPV ELRS Lite 2.4GHz Nano RX
radios.notes: Budget tinywhoop ELRS RX. SX1280, ESP8285. Direct competitor to Happymodel EP1.

sensors.name: HDZero Freestyle V2 Camera
sensors.notes: Pairs only with HDZero Freestyle V2 VTX. 1/1.8" CMOS, WDR.

sensors.name: Walksnail Camera V2 with Gyroflow
sensors.notes: Pairs only with Walksnail Avatar V2 VTX. Gyroflow support for post-flight stabilization. Includes 32GB microSD.

sensors.name: Matek M10Q-5883 GNSS + Compass
sensors.notes: u-blox SAM-M10Q + QMC5883L. Multi-constellation (GPS+GLONASS+Galileo+BeiDou). Primary pairing: F405-WING V2.

sensors.name: Walksnail Avatar HD VTX V2 (32GB)
sensors.notes: 1080p HD digital FPV system. 22ms latency. 30.5x30.5 / 20x20 mount. 32GB onboard recording.

sensors.name: DJI O3 Air Unit (Camera + VTX)
sensors.notes: 32g VTX + camera combo. 30ms latency. 32.5x30.5x14.5mm module. 4K60 onboard recording.

sensors.name: Foxeer Razer Mini 1200TVL Analog FPV Camera
sensors.notes: 1/3" CMOS 1200TVL. 21.8x21.8mm. Switchable 4:3/16:9 and PAL/NTSC. 0.01Lux minimum illumination.

sensors.name: RunCam Phoenix 2 SP 1500TVL Starlight Analog
sensors.notes: 1/2.8" Starlight CMOS with Global WDR. Premium analog freestyle camera with low-light strength.

sensors.name: Caddx Vista DJI Digital HD VTX
sensors.notes: Compact DJI digital VTX. 21-28ms latency in low-latency mode. 4km FCC range. Older but well-supported.

sensors.name: Caddx Ratel 2 1200TVL Starlight Analog Camera
sensors.notes: 1/1.8" Starlight CMOS. 19x19x20mm. Industry-favorite analog freestyle camera.

sensors.name: RunCam Hybrid 2 Dual 4K + Analog Camera
sensors.notes: Hybrid analog FPV + 4K HD recording on one 20x20 board. 20ms FPV latency.

sensors.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Goggles X
sensors.notes: Premium digital FPV goggle. 1080p 100fps. PD 57-72mm. Built-in gyro. Compatible with Walksnail / Analog / HDZero.

accessories.name: RadioMaster TX16S Mark II (EdgeTX Radio Controller)
accessories.notes: Mode 2. EdgeTX firmware preinstalled. JR module bay accepts HappyModel ES24TX Pro. 2x 18650 Li-Ion battery (included).

accessories.name: HDZero Goggle V1 (HDZ3510)
accessories.notes: Dual HDZero receivers. Analog reception requires Expansion Module (line 51). External battery needed. Built-in H.264 DVR.

accessories.name: HDZero Goggle Expansion Module (Analog + WiFi)
accessories.notes: Adds analog 5.8GHz reception + WiFi live stream to HDZero Goggle. Only 20 modules for 50 goggles — prioritize mixed-feed stations.

accessories.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Goggles X
accessories.notes: Pairs with Walksnail Avatar V2 VTX. HDMI-in for simulator use. 1080p60 DVR.

accessories.name: Walksnail Avatar FPV VRX (External Receiver)
accessories.notes: HDMI-out for instructor monitoring via external screen. USB-C power.

accessories.name: ImmersionRC Rapidfire Analog Diversity Receiver
accessories.notes: Orqa FPV.One / Fatshark HDO module bay. Quadversity analog diversity. **VERIFY pairing goggles exist** — may be unused stock.

accessories.name: TrueRC Core 5.8GHz 85mm U.FL Antenna
accessories.notes: U.FL termination. Atlatl HV V2 uses MMCX — adapter needed unless VTX has U.FL pigtail.

accessories.name: X2-AIR RHCP Antenna Pair for HDZero Goggles
accessories.notes: Goggle-side SMA. RHCP matched pair.

accessories.name: EMAX ES08 MA II Metal Gear Servo 9g
accessories.notes: 1.8 kg-cm torque @ 6V, 0.12 sec/60°. Plenty for 4-5 servos × 25 fixed-wing builds.

accessories.name: Caddx GM3 Gimbal (no camera)
accessories.notes: Camera sold separately. PWM control from FC. Fixed-wing / VTOL stabilization.

accessories.name: RadioMaster Pocket (ELRS 2.4GHz internal)
accessories.notes: Smallest full-featured EdgeTX radio. Internal ELRS 2.4GHz up to 250mW. 2x 18650 Li-Ion removable. Great for patrol / ruck-carry. 4-channel gimbal.

accessories.name: RadioMaster Boxer (ELRS 2.4GHz internal)
accessories.notes: Mid-size gamepad-style radio. Hall gimbals, EdgeTX, internal ELRS 1W. 2x 18650 battery. Between Pocket and TX16S.

accessories.name: FrSky X9D Plus SE 2019 (ACCESS + OpenTX/EdgeTX)
accessories.notes: Legacy-standard radio. Native FrSky ACCESS but accepts JR-bay modules (ES24TX Pro, Crossfire, etc.). Widely fielded — compatible with most existing training inventories.

accessories.name: Jumper T-Pro V2 (ELRS 2.4GHz internal, multi-protocol)
accessories.notes: Gamepad-style radio with internal ELRS + optional 4-in-1 multi-protocol module. Compact. 2x 18350 Li-Ion.

accessories.name: Fatshark Dominator HDO2 (analog, module bay)
accessories.notes: Analog goggles, OLED micro-displays. Module bay accepts Rapidfire + TrueRC Fusion. Long-standing operator choice for analog.

accessories.name: DJI Goggles 2 (DJI O3 ecosystem)
accessories.notes: Closed-ecosystem DJI digital goggles. Only works with DJI O3 / Vista VTX. 1080p60, <30ms latency. USB-C power.

accessories.name: SkyZone SKY04X v2 (analog diversity + HDMI in)
accessories.notes: Integrated analog diversity + DVR. HDMI-in for simulator / secondary feed. Adjustable IPD.

accessories.name: TrueRC Singularity 5.8GHz Stubby RHCP
accessories.notes: Short-range omni for VTX or goggle. ~1.6 dBi. RHCP. Durable for crashes.

accessories.name: Lumenier AXII Patch HD 5.8GHz (9 dBi, SMA)
accessories.notes: High-gain directional patch for goggle / ground-station. 9 dBi, 5.8GHz. Doubles effective range on the receive side when paired with an omni.

accessories.name: ImmersionRC Pagoda 2 5.8GHz (RHCP)
accessories.notes: Pagoda PCB-based omni. Good for ground-station omni or VTX side. ~2.2 dBi.

accessories.name: 2.4GHz Dipole Antenna (T-Antenna for ELRS RX)
accessories.notes: Standard ELRS 2.4GHz T-antenna. Common across Gemini RX, Solkin R24, HappyModel EP1/EP2.

accessories.name: 915MHz Long-Range Dipole (IPEX, for ELRS 915 RX)
accessories.notes: Long-wire 915MHz RX antenna. Pairs with HGLRC Gemini 915 / Matek R24-915 / TBS Crossfire RX.

accessories.name: ISDT Q6 Nano (200W DC charger, 1-6S)
accessories.notes: Compact 200W DC balance charger. 1-6S LiPo/Li-ion. Needs 12-28V input (vehicle inverter or wall PSU).

accessories.name: ToolkitRC M8S (1500W 8-channel smart charger)
accessories.notes: Rapid charger for fleet ops. 8 packs at once, 1500W total. 30V input max. Built-in cell checker + servo tester. Standard at squadron-level FPV trainings.

accessories.name: LiPo Safe Bag Large (fire-resistant)
accessories.notes: Mandatory for charge/storage. Holds ~6-8 6S packs. Replace if smoke staining appears.

accessories.name: 1-8S LiPo Voltage Checker + Low-Voltage Alarm
accessories.notes: Plug into balance lead. Shows per-cell voltage; beeps at programmable low-voltage threshold. Critical for lost-drone recovery (audible locator).

accessories.name: GoPro HERO 11 Black (action cam, payload)
accessories.notes: 5.3K60 HDR action cam. Common secondary recording payload for cinematography and survey flights. Mount on top of frame; adds ~160g AUW.

accessories.name: Insta360 X3 (360° action cam, payload)
accessories.notes: 360° dual-lens action cam. Re-frame in post; useful for AAR / situational awareness recording.

accessories.name: Lost-Drone Buzzer (VIFLY Finder 2)
accessories.notes: Self-powered 105dB piezo finder. Activates on lost-signal OR on vibration after crash. Replaceable coin cell lasts months.

accessories.name: 200A Current Sensor (Hall-effect, external)
accessories.notes: External current sensor for FCs without integrated sensing. Needed for accurate mAh-used telemetry on 10"+ heavy-lift builds.

accessories.name: XT60 ↔ XT90 Adapter (for 10" / heavy-lift packs)
accessories.notes: Adapter for builds with XT90 batteries but XT60 frames (or vice-versa).

accessories.name: 5" Tri-Blade Prop Set (Gemfan Hurricane 51477 / HQ Prop T5)
accessories.notes: Standard 5" tri-blade racing/freestyle prop. Pack of 4 (2 CW + 2 CCW).

accessories.name: 7" Bi-Blade Long-Range Prop (HQ Prop DP7x4x2 / equivalent)
accessories.notes: Efficient 7" bi-blade for long-range cruise. Lower thrust, better endurance than tri-blade.

accessories.name: 10" Tri-Blade Cargo Prop (HQ Prop 1050 / Ethix 1050)
accessories.notes: Heavy-lift 10" tri-blade for mapping and cinematography builds. Paired with 3110 motors on 10" X-frames.

accessories.name: HQProp Ethix S5 5x4x3 (Set of 4)
accessories.notes: 5" 3-blade freestyle prop. 5mm hub. Bardwell signature pick — community freestyle staple.

accessories.name: TrueRC X²-AIR 5.8 MK II Patch Antenna (RHCP/LHCP)
accessories.notes: Patch antenna for goggles. 13 dBic gain, 150° horizontal beam-width. RHCP or LHCP option.

accessories.name: HQProp Freestyle 5x4.3x3 V2S (Set of 4)
accessories.notes: 5" 3-blade freestyle prop. Slightly heavier hub than Ethix S5. 12.8mm hub, 5mm shaft.

accessories.name: Lumenier AXII 2 Long Range 5.8GHz RHCP Antenna
accessories.notes: Industry-standard 5.8GHz omni antenna for VTX or goggle. 2.2 dBic gain RHCP. SMA connector.

accessories.name: Lumenier AXII 2 Long Range 5.8GHz LHCP Antenna
accessories.notes: LHCP variant for race-event polarization isolation.
